titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 732
GA 732
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Repeat of καθως ειπον υμιν moved from 10.26 to 10.27 by David Parker.
ουν deleted at 18.28 by David Parker.
Second block amrker added for repeat of 5.13 by David Parker.
Lectionary heading removed from title by David Parker.
Gaps associated with abbreviated lemma tags removed by David Parker.
Ab tag moved to after witness end tag at 20.22 by Rachel Kevern.
οιδα αλλα τριων corrected to οιδασιν των αλλοτριων at 10.5-2 by Rachel Kevern.
Commentary that had been treated as lemma at 17.24 removed and editorial note added by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 5.5 by David Parker.
Iota adscript removed by David Parker.
Word break in 20.19 corrected and block marker added for repeat of 1.4 by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Catherine Smith.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-A Number: 732Name of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 176rBase text used: TRns Transcribed by: Michael A. Clark Transcription begun: 26.08.2010 Transcription finished: 20.05.2011Commentary tags added by: Samuel Gibson – 28.01.2012-09.02.2012Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - Yes Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (>) - Yes, to indicate lemmata Obeloi (†) - No Other remarks: 732 is a commentary. Some verses are omitted:7.53-8.119.22-2311.46 Some missing verses are indicated by the word εως. Some verses are repeated in their entirety:1.24-25 on f184r.9.20 on f234v.10.5 on 236v.10.10 on f237r.Some verses are out out of the normal order, with the order running:1.1-4.85.5-5.164.16-5.44.9-4.156.22-6.305.19-6.225.17-5.186.31-20.2921.15-21.1920.30-21.1421.19-end.RK - the following folios have been transposed so that the text runs in the correct order (they had been incorrectly bound):199 and 206207 and 214269 and 270

This manuscript has been rebound incorrectly and some of the leaves positioned the wrong way round in the process resulting in some of the text ending up out of order. The text has been restored to the correct order but the folio numbers are now out of sequence. This affects folios 199 and 206; 207 and 214; and 269 and 270.

ab.note: The next 11 folios are identified as 259a to 259k because they have been numbered incorrectly. Correct folio enumeration recommences on F 260.
Followed by commentary that has been treated as lemma.
